audit_items.proof_trace: calloc allocates st.page_data at line 432 but there is no free(st.page_data) on any return path (the function has a single exit at line 463). Neither extstore_get_page_data nor extstore_evict_page have access to this pointer. Every call leaks page_count * sizeof(extstore_page_data) bytes of heap memory.
audit_items.attack_scenario: An attacker sends repeated write requests that exhaust writable pages, causing extstore_write (lines 605, 620) to call _evict_page on each attempt. Each call leaks ~page_count*40 bytes; sustained traffic produces unbounded heap growth leading to OOM and service crash.
